message: Preview for mode 'pr_only' is informational only. Generate a PR bundle to review the change set.
impact_summary: S3 server access logs will be enabled and delivered to a dedicated destination bucket. S3 server access logs will be delivered to the selected dedicated log bucket.

blocked_reasons: Log destination must be a dedicated bucket and cannot match the source bucket.
Log destination must be a dedicated bucket. Do not use the source bucket as the log destination.
resolution.decision_rationale: Family resolver downgraded S3.9 to destination-safety review. Log destination must be a dedicated bucket and cannot match the source bucket. Blocking checks: Log destination must be a dedicated bucket. Do not use the source bucket as the log destination..
